peer_group: 金融-银行-股份制与城商行
reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Reviewer explicitly retains China Merchants Bank.
analyst_response: Accepted. It is the A-share bank quality anchor because its retail wealth management core deposits customer franchise and risk culture are hard to replicate.
calibrated_standard_implication: Bank core watch requires a differentiated liability base customer ecosystem risk culture and business model that are hard for another funded player to replicate.

peer_group: 金融-银行-股份制与城商行
reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Reviewer explicitly retains Bank of Ningbo.
analyst_response: Accepted. It is retained as a differentiated city-bank sample rather than as a weaker copy of China Merchants Bank.
calibrated_standard_implication: City banks can be retained when SME service private-business relationships risk selection and regional operating culture create a separate hard-to-replace franchise.

peer_group: 金融-银行-股份制与城商行
reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Reviewer explicitly retains Postal Savings Bank of China.
analyst_response: Accepted. The postal network down-market customer base and deposit franchise are accepted as a distinct moat even though profitability quality is lower than China Merchants Bank.
calibrated_standard_implication: A bank can be retained for a unique low-cost deposit and distribution network when that network is not covered by the retained retail wealth-management leader.

peer_group: 金融-银行-股份制与城商行
analyst_response: Accepted. The microloan and small-business bank model is accepted as a distinct niche that should be observed separately from national banks and larger city banks.
calibrated_standard_implication: Small regional banks can be retained when their microloan underwriting local information and risk-control model are the core thesis rather than simple regional credit beta.

reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Reviewer rejects all other banks in this group.

reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Reviewer rejects all other banks in this group.

peer_group: 金融-银行-股份制与城商行
reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Reviewer rejects all other banks in this group.
analyst_response: Accepted. CITIC Bank does not show an irreplaceable franchise not already covered by China Merchants Bank or the retained differentiated banks.

peer_group: 金融-银行-股份制与城商行
reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Reviewer rejects all other banks in this group.
